title: EditorToolbar — Trim / Clear All / Split Quick-Action Buttons
problem: Creating cut regions by dragging is precise but slow for the most common editing tasks: trimming dead air from the start and end (80% of edits), and splitting a clip at a specific time. Quick-action buttons accelerate these workflows without requiring manual dragging.
analysis:
EditorToolbar renders three action buttons: Trim, Clear All, Split.

- **Trim:** pre-seeds start cut (0 → 20% of duration) + end cut (80% → 100%). Replaces any existing start/end cuts. Gives immediate region handles the user can then drag to fine-tune. No dialog.
- **Clear All:** removes all cut regions. Button disabled when no cuts exist (hasCuts=false prop). Immediate — no confirmation (operation is undoable via undo stack).
- **Split:** enters split mode. Opens WaveformSplitter controls. The waveform enters split mode — a cyan split marker appears that the user positions. Confirm splits the clip into Part A and Part B via API.

Position: below the waveform area, above the cut list.
successCriteria:
- Trim button: adds start/end cuts at 20%/80% boundaries immediately
- Clear All: removes all cuts, disabled when hasCuts=false
- Split: enters split mode, shows WaveformSplitter panel, WaveformCanvas shows split marker
- All buttons: minimum 44px touch target
- Trim and Clear All do not require confirmation
- Split requires confirmation (in WaveformSplitter sheet before API call)
implementation: components/clips/EditorToolbar.tsx: props { hasCuts, duration, onTrim, onClearAll, onEnterSplitMode }. Three Button components (ghost or secondary variant). Trim: calls onTrim() which adds [{ startMs: 0, endMs: dur*0.2 }, { startMs: dur*0.8, endMs: dur }] to cutMarks. Clear All: calls onClearAll(). Split: calls onEnterSplitMode().

decisions.decision: Trim pre-seeds at 20% boundaries without confirmation
decisions.rationale: The 20% default gives enough buffer for typical dead air at the start and end of a jam recording. Pre-seeding without confirmation means the user can immediately see and drag the handles — this is faster than showing a dialog asking 'how much to trim'. The undo stack captures this operation.
decisions.recommendation: Trim adds two cut regions at 0-20% and 80-100%. User drags handles to adjust. No dialog.

knownLimitations: Trim percentages (20%/80%) are hardcoded — not configurable per clip
userGuide: Tap Trim to automatically mark the start and end of the recording for trimming — then drag the region handles to adjust. Tap Clear All to start over. Tap Split to cut a song into two separate clips.
